description: X/Twitter crawler accounts for authenticated scraping

accounts.notes: Primary account for KOL discovery - requires real X cookies. Country code used by Oxylabs proxy.

how_to_get_cookies: 1. Open x.com in your browser and log in
2. Open DevTools (F12) and go to Application tab
6. Keep this file PRIVATE - never commit real cookies to git!
proxy_setup: The proxy settings use Oxylabs residential proxies with:
- sessionType: 'sticky' to maintain same IP during session
- Credentials MUST be stored in environment variables:
- Per-account 'country' field overrides default proxy country
environment_variables: Set these in GitHub Actions secrets:
The auth manager will automatically use env vars if available,
overriding the values in this config file.
